name: Daisy
description: A Fairy transposed from the distant past. She is said to have created a mysterious artifact while conducting research with explorers of various races. By what seems like fate, or mere chance, she crosses paths with Tristan and the gang and becomes caught up in a turmoil that shakes all of Britannia

skills.name: Go Away / Energy Blast
skills.description: [Default] Inflicts damage equal to 174% of Attack. Magic Gauge is restored by 300 if an enemy is struck, and their Earth Resistance is decreased by 20% for 20 sec. [Riding] Inflicts damage equal to 256% of Attack. Each hit consumes 100 of the Magic Gauge to increase damage by 10%. Restores the Magic Gauge by 100 when the same target is hit 5 time(s).

skills.name: Help Me, Domby
skills.description: The hero summons and rides Domby for 20 sec. The hero gains Reaction Immunity while riding.

skills.name: Here Comes Daisy
skills.description: Inflicts damage equal to 113% of Attack.

skills.description: Inflicts damage equal to 142% of Attack. Increases damage dealt by 30% when Riding. 1st hit: 21% 2nd hit: 23% 3rd hit: 37% 4th hit: 61%

skills.name: Offbeat Girl
skills.description: Increases the default state's Magic Charging Efficiency by 50%, and the Ultimate Move does not consume Magic.

skills.name: Special Attack
skills.description: [Default] Decreases damage taken by 70% while the stance is maintained. Additionally, nearby enemies are Staggered and the Magic Gauge is restored by 100 every 1 sec. [Riding] Inflicts damage equal to up to 163% of Attack. Consumes 100 Magic Gauge to increase damage by 10% every 0.4 sec while the stance is maintained. Restores Magic by 300 when the stance is maintained for 2 sec.
